name: Screen Color Picker
description: Sample any pixel on screen and copy its hex code to the clipboard.
author: Coco

subtitle.en: Magnifier loupe → click → hex on clipboard
subtitle.zh: 放大镜 → 点击屏幕 → hex 到剪贴板

subtitle.en: Snapshot the main display, pick where to save the PNG
subtitle.zh: 截取主屏幕，选择保存 PNG 的位置
